pr.title: fix(ui): migrate to --v2-font-family-sans variable and improve home empty state
pr.body:
## Summary

Migrates all UI v2 component CSS files from the generic `--font-family-sans` variable to the scoped `--v2-font-family-sans` variable, and makes a few small fixes to the home page.

## Changes

- **UI v2**: Replaces `--font-family-sans` with `--v2-font-family-sans` across all v2 component stylesheets (button, checkbox, dialog, menu, radio, select, switch, tabs, text-input, textarea, and more).
- **Theme**: Adds `--v2-font-family-sans` to the theme CSS variables.
- **Home page**: Improves handling of empty project states by falling back to all project directories when no specific project is selected. Also adjusts the project column spacing and padding.

## Verification

- All affected packages pass typecheck.
- No visual regressions expected—the new variable maps to the same `Inter` font family.
pr.author: Brendonovich
